findings.title: Missing description for locale `de-DE`
findings.message: The App Store description is empty for the de-DE localization. This is a required field for submission.
findings.remedy: Add a compelling description for de-DE in App Store Connect > App Store > Version Information.

findings.title: Missing keywords for locale `de-DE`
findings.message: Keywords field is empty for de-DE. This is a missed ASO (App Store Optimization) opportunity.
findings.remedy: Add comma-separated keywords (max 100 chars) for de-DE to improve search visibility.

findings.title: Missing promotional text for locale `de-DE`
findings.message: Promotional text is empty for de-DE. This field can be updated without app review.
findings.remedy: Add promotional text for de-DE. This is shown at the top of the description and can be updated anytime.

findings.title: Missing promotional text for locale `ja`
findings.message: Promotional text is empty for ja. This field can be updated without app review.
findings.remedy: Add promotional text for ja. This is shown at the top of the description and can be updated anytime.

findings.title: Placeholder text detected in `ja` description
findings.message: The description for ja contains placeholder text matching "\bTODO\b". This will likely cause rejection.
findings.remedy: Replace placeholder text in the ja description with real content before submission.

findings.title: Description too short for locale `ja`
findings.message: The description for ja is only 35 characters. Consider expanding it for better ASO.
findings.remedy: Expand the ja description to at least 100 characters with feature highlights, benefits, and relevant keywords.

findings.title: Weak keywords in `ja`
findings.message: Keywords contain weak or disallowed terms: app, free. Apple auto-indexes "app" and "free" and rejects pricing/superlative claims.
findings.remedy: Remove weak keywords to save character limits. Use specific terms describing features.

findings.title: Duplicate keywords in `ja`
findings.message: Your keywords field contains duplicated terms. This wastes your 100-character limit.
findings.remedy: Remove duplicate keywords. Apple automatically combines singular/plural and keyword combinations. Example: use "weather,radar,forecast" instead of "weather,weather radar,forecast".

findings.title: Missing promotional text for locale `fr-FR`
findings.message: Promotional text is empty for fr-FR. This field can be updated without app review.
findings.remedy: Add promotional text for fr-FR. This is shown at the top of the description and can be updated anytime.

findings.title: Description too short for locale `fr-FR`
findings.message: The description for fr-FR is only 99 characters. Consider expanding it for better ASO.
findings.remedy: Expand the fr-FR description to at least 100 characters with feature highlights, benefits, and relevant keywords.

findings.title: App info locale `ko` missing version metadata
findings.message: App info localization exists for ko but there's no corresponding version localization (description, keywords, etc.).
findings.remedy: Add version metadata (description, keywords) for ko or remove the app info localization if not needed.

findings.title: Duplicate screenshots detected in `en-US`
findings.message: Multiple screenshots in the iPhone 6.7" set have the exact same image checksum.
findings.remedy: Remove duplicated files and ensure all screenshots show unique functionality.

findings.title: Empty screenshot set for iPhone 6.7" in `de-DE`
findings.message: A screenshot set exists for iPhone 6.7" (de-DE) but contains 0 screenshots. Either upload screenshots or remove the empty set.
findings.remedy: Upload screenshots to the iPhone 6.7" set for de-DE, or delete the empty set.

findings.title: Missing required iPad screenshots for `de-DE`
findings.message: Your app has iPad screenshots, but none for the required 13" or 12.9" Pro format in de-DE.
findings.remedy: Upload 13" or 12.9" iPad Pro screenshots for de-DE.

findings.title: Few screenshots for iPhone 6.7" in `ja`
findings.message: Only 1 screenshot(s) for iPhone 6.7" (ja). Apple allows up to 10. More screenshots improve conversion.
findings.remedy: Consider adding more screenshots (recommended: 5-8) for iPhone 6.7" in ja.

findings.title: No screenshots for locale `fr-FR`
findings.message: The fr-FR localization has no screenshot sets. At least one set with screenshots is required for submission.
findings.remedy: Upload screenshots for fr-FR in App Store Connect > App Store > Version > Media.

findings.title: All age rating fields set to minimal
findings.message: All content descriptors are set to NONE or INFREQUENT_OR_MILD. Verify this accurately reflects your app's content.
findings.remedy: Review the age rating questionnaire to ensure it accurately represents your app's content.

findings.title: Generic subtitle for locale `en-US`
findings.message: The subtitle for en-US ("Best Weather App") contains the generic term "best". Apple may flag superlative or subjective claims.
findings.remedy: Replace generic terms with specific, factual descriptions of what your app does. Example: Use "Track daily expenses" instead of "Best finance app".

findings.title: Missing subtitle for locale `de-DE`
findings.message: No subtitle is set for de-DE. Subtitles appear below the app name in search results and improve discoverability.
findings.remedy: Add a compelling subtitle (max 30 chars) for de-DE that highlights your app's key value proposition.

findings.title: Subtitle too short for locale `ja`
findings.message: The subtitle for ja is only 2 characters ("WP"). Consider using more of the 30-character limit.
findings.remedy: Expand the subtitle for ja to better utilize the 30-character limit.

findings.title: Missing subtitle for locale `ko`
findings.message: No subtitle is set for ko. Subtitles appear below the app name in search results and improve discoverability.
findings.remedy: Add a compelling subtitle (max 30 chars) for ko that highlights your app's key value proposition.

findings.title: Missing privacy policy URL for locale `ja`
findings.message: No privacy policy URL is set for ja. A valid privacy policy URL is required for all apps since October 2018.
findings.remedy: Add a publicly accessible privacy policy URL for ja in App Store Connect > App Information.

findings.title: Privacy policy URL not HTTPS for locale `fr-FR`
findings.message: The privacy policy URL for fr-FR uses HTTP instead of HTTPS. Apple recommends HTTPS for all URLs.
findings.remedy: Update the privacy policy URL for fr-FR to use HTTPS.

findings.title: No privacy choices URL configured
findings.message: No privacy choices URL is set. This is optional but recommended if your app collects personal data and you offer data management options.
findings.remedy: Consider adding a privacy choices URL where users can manage their data preferences.

findings.title: Subscription group "WeatherPulse Pro" missing `de-DE` localization
findings.message: The subscription group "WeatherPulse Pro" has no display name for de-DE. This can cause "Missing Metadata" states for subscriptions in this group.
findings.remedy: Add a display name for de-DE under the subscription group "WeatherPulse Pro" in App Store Connect.

findings.title: Subscription group "WeatherPulse Pro" missing `ja` localization
findings.message: The subscription group "WeatherPulse Pro" has no display name for ja. This can cause "Missing Metadata" states for subscriptions in this group.
findings.remedy: Add a display name for ja under the subscription group "WeatherPulse Pro" in App Store Connect.

findings.title: Subscription group "WeatherPulse Pro" missing `fr-FR` localization
findings.message: The subscription group "WeatherPulse Pro" has no display name for fr-FR. This can cause "Missing Metadata" states for subscriptions in this group.
findings.remedy: Add a display name for fr-FR under the subscription group "WeatherPulse Pro" in App Store Connect.

findings.title: Subscription "Monthly Pro" missing display name for `de-DE`
findings.message: The subscription "Monthly Pro" has no localized display name for de-DE. This is required for the subscription sheet.
findings.remedy: Add a display name for "Monthly Pro" in de-DE.

findings.title: Subscription "Monthly Pro" missing description for `de-DE`
findings.message: The subscription "Monthly Pro" has no localized description for de-DE. This is required for App Store display.
findings.remedy: Add a description for "Monthly Pro" in de-DE.

findings.title: Subscription "Monthly Pro" missing `ja` localization
findings.message: Your app supports ja but the subscription "Monthly Pro" has no localization for it.
findings.remedy: Add localized metadata for "Monthly Pro" in ja.

findings.title: Subscription "Monthly Pro" missing `fr-FR` localization
findings.message: Your app supports fr-FR but the subscription "Monthly Pro" has no localization for it.
findings.remedy: Add localized metadata for "Monthly Pro" in fr-FR.

findings.title: Missing billing terms in description for `en-US`
findings.message: The subscription "Monthly Pro" mentions a "trial" or "free" period but does not explain auto-renewal or cancellation terms.
findings.remedy: Add text explaining that the subscription auto-renews. Example: "Subscription automatically renews unless auto-renew is turned off at least 24-hours before the end of the current period. Account will be charged for renewal within 24-hours prior to the end of the current period."

findings.title: IAP "Radar Themes Pack" missing `de-DE` localization
findings.message: Your app supports de-DE but the IAP "Radar Themes Pack" has no localization for it.
findings.remedy: Add localized metadata for "Radar Themes Pack" in de-DE.

findings.title: IAP "Radar Themes Pack" missing `ja` localization
findings.message: Your app supports ja but the IAP "Radar Themes Pack" has no localization for it.
findings.remedy: Add localized metadata for "Radar Themes Pack" in ja.

findings.title: IAP "Radar Themes Pack" missing `fr-FR` localization
findings.message: Your app supports fr-FR but the IAP "Radar Themes Pack" has no localization for it.
findings.remedy: Add localized metadata for "Radar Themes Pack" in fr-FR.

findings.title: Limited territory coverage (6 territories)
findings.message: Your app is available in only 6 territories. Apple supports 175+ storefronts.
findings.remedy: Consider expanding availability to more territories to increase your potential audience.

findings.title: Missing 9 major market(s)
findings.message: Your app is not available in: Japan, China, South Korea, Brazil, India, Italy, Spain, Netherlands, Turkey. These are among the highest-revenue App Store markets.
findings.remedy: Consider making your app available in these markets: Japan, China, South Korea, Brazil, India, Italy, Spain, Netherlands, Turkey.

findings.title: Localized for `ja` but not available in corresponding territory
findings.message: Your app has ja localization but is not available in the corresponding territory. The localization effort may be wasted.
findings.remedy: Consider making your app available in the territory that corresponds to the ja localization, or remove the unused localization.

findings.title: Missing reviewer contact phone
findings.message: No phone number provided for the review team.
findings.remedy: Consider adding a phone number for faster communication during review.

findings.title: No review notes provided
findings.message: The review notes field is empty. Notes can help the reviewer understand special features, required hardware, or complex flows.
findings.remedy: Consider adding notes to guide the reviewer, especially for apps with sign-in, subscriptions, or specialized hardware.
